title: Marium Soulslike Weaponry Refresh
description: A retexture for the mod marium soulslike weaponry
body:
## WARNING, this pack is still **Unfinished**.


so in short, i just made textures for marium's soulslike weaponry and i wanted to share it to other people !

oh yeah of course it requires marium soulslike weaponry :
https://modrinth.com/mod/mariums-soulslike-weaponry/versions

 
### what to expect :

retexture of weapons, bosses, items and maybe blocks.
Some model tweaks for performance and
Animation smoothing and tweaks

to see images for the ressource pack go in gallery.
